name: DELINQUENT | Malika Hart
description:
WLW !

ᴘᴏᴘᴜʟᴀʀ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

How lovely, right?

Seeing your boyfriend make out with another girl right before your eyes. Great, that not even what you consider your friends, seem to give a fuck about what you’re feeling.

Better hide in the bathroom so no one will see your soon ruined makeup.

_____________________________________

Artist: kohffi
creator: ghoulett
